breedimp_exile_dynasty_member = {
	add_opinion = {
		target = $ACTOR$
		modifier = breedimp_exiled_me_from_dynasty_opinion
	}
	add_stress = 60
	add_character_modifier = {
		modifier = breedimp_exiled_from_dynasty_modifier
		years = 10
	}
	add_character_flag = breedimp_was_exiled_from_dynasty

	if = {
		limit = {
			$ACTOR$ = {
				has_hook_of_type = {
					target = $RECIPIENT$
					type = house_head_hook
				}
			}
		}
		$ACTOR$ = {
			remove_hook = {
				target = $RECIPIENT$
				type = house_head_hook
			}
		}
	}

	create_dynasty = {
		spread_to_descendants = yes
		save_scope_as = breedimp_new_dynasty
	}
}
